description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the clojure:lein-2.7.0 Docker image for most jobs and the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 image for the deploy job, with stages test, package, and deploy. In the test stage define three jobs: ancient runs `lein ancient`, kibit runs `lein kibit`, and test runs `lein test`. In the package stage add a package job that runs `lein pom`, publishes all untracked files as artifacts, and is limited to the master branch. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that depends on the package job, uses the Maven image, copies `ci/settings.xml` to `/root/.m2/settings.xml` and then executes `mvn deploy`, also only on the master branch.
